active_decisions.decision: False positive: the .work suspicious-TLD IOC matches benign source tokens (i18n key t.work, CSS class .work) in the personal-site homepage code. No network access to any .work domain is involved.
active_decisions.followUpAction: Scope the suspicious-TLD matcher to URL contexts (scheme or host boundary) so bare code tokens like t.work stop matching; revisit when upstream ships the fix.

active_decisions.decision: False positive: the .click suspicious-TLD IOC matches the DOM API call link.click() in component scripts. No network access to any .click domain is involved.
active_decisions.followUpAction: Scope the suspicious-TLD matcher to URL contexts (scheme or host boundary) so DOM API tokens like element.click() stop matching; covered by the same upstream bug report as the .work finding.
